steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content:
The word
"Unlike" directly introduces a contrast between Mori Takashi (who adopted European methods) and Saito Ren. This requires a word showing Saito used or accepted traditional Japanese approaches.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The example explains that Saito used traditional Japanese methods (e.g., pigments on silk), so the blank must mean “used/accepted.”
"Embraced" conveys active acceptance, matching the example.

The other choices either reverse the contrast or are irrelevant.
That is the correct answer.
